name: io.github.shanjai-raj/commune-mcp
title: Commune
description: Email and SMS MCP server for AI agents — send and receive email, search inboxes, manage programmatic inboxes, provision phone numbers, and send SMS. 41 tools built for agents, not humans.

environmentVariables.name: COMMUNE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Commune API key (starts with comm_). Get one at https://app.commune.email
